title: HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies:
HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies!
